'''Jaris Affric''' was the [[High Lord]] of the [[Sarin sector/Legends|Sarin sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="GG9" /> and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Santarine]]. He controlled several corporate and criminal interests, and had considerable hereditary holdings throughout the Sarin sector.<ref name="J15">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref> Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Affric's loose interpretation of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] against the Empire<ref name="GG10" /> led him to employ the bulk of the [[Mantis Syndicate]]'s [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] on retainer, essentially using them as a personal army<ref name="GG9" /> to serve his own interests by posting [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] either personally,<ref name="GG10" /> or through the myriad of companies and organizations he controlled. Affric aimed the Mantis Syndicate at criminal organizations, [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gangs, and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] units operating throughout the Sarin sector, especially those that directly opposed the High Lord.<ref name="J15" /> A keen duellist, he frequently engaged the services of [[The Most Honourable Guild of Armourers]] to procure rare and ancient [[duelling sword]]s and [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]].<ref name="GG9" />

As the war in the Sarin sector escalated, Affric deployed the Mantis Syndicate in both regular combat and special operations, where they opposed both the Alliance and [[Churhee's Riflemen]]. However, as the war turned against the Empire, Affric began to run up a debt to the Mantis Syndicate, which was not tolerated by their leader, [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Marina Mantis]], who recalled her hunters. Affric protested loudly, then immediately defected to the newly established [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Although he lost power and influence, Affric remained free.<ref name="J15" />
